---
title: "Quarto example"
author: "Mia Kupres"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: false
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Setup

This is a small Quarto example using built-in R data.

```{r}
data(mtcars)
head(mtcars)
```

## Summary Statistics

```{r}
summary(mtcars[, c("mpg", "wt", "hp")])
```

## Simple Plot

```{r}
plot(
    mtcars$wt,
    mtcars$mpg,
    main = "Miles Per Gallon vs Vehicle Weight",
    xlab = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
    ylab = "Miles per Gallon",
    pch = 19,
    col = "steelblue"
)
```

## Regression Model

```{r}
model <- lm(mpg ~ wt, data = mtcars)
summary(model)
```

The fitted slope is `r round(coef(model)[["wt"]], 3)`, so the estimated miles per gallon decreases as vehicle weight increases.
